Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2048 "V-2048" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "V (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
NOP'd out the JMP $213D instruction at $228B to remove the disk drive protection check which causes the game to crash if a drive is detected.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
